texto: Sometimes all a person wants is an empathetic ear
autor: all he or she needs is to talk it out. Just offering a listening ear and an understanding heart for his or her suffering can be a big comfort.
explicacao: Citação de all he or she needs is to talk it out. Just offering a listening ear and an understanding heart for his or her suffering can be a big comfort. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes all a person wants is an empathetic ear” articula reflexao, roy-t-bennett, sometimes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
